kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Exactly two of the artisan who makes Barrels, the artisan who makes Pottery, the artisan in Millpond, and the artisan in Riverside belong to the Ironmongers' Guild.
Carpenter goes with at least three of Cedric, Anvil, Horseshoes, Southgate, and 11 coins.
Exactly one of these is true: Cedric goes with Awl; Carpenter goes with Loom; Potter goes with Rope.
Barrels goes with exactly four of Godfrey, Blacksmith, Hammer, Riverside, and 11 coins.
The artisan who makes Barrels' levy is between the artisan in Riverside and Aldric.
Eastcheap goes with either Godfrey or Horseshoes (but not both).
The artisan in Eastcheap's levy is at least 2 coins more than the artisan who makes Horseshoes.
If Cooper goes with Loom, then Aldric goes with Pottery.
Exactly one of (the members of the Hill Ward, the artisan with 10 coins, and the artisan with the Anvil) goes with (Cooper or Carpenter).
Between Horseshoes and Pottery, one goes with 9 coins and the other with 10 coins.
